Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Platform Availability: 2-service equal-weight composite (99.9% target)

Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Maximum Members (25): large composite representing a full service catalog

Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Mixed grouped and ungrouped members
